scripts.build: node scripts/verify-entry-uniqueness.cjs && node scripts/bot-preflight-scan.cjs --fail-at=4 && node scripts/bot-preflight-scan-glossary.cjs --fail-at=1 && node scripts/verify-program-walkthroughs.cjs && node scripts/claim-gate.cjs --all && vite build && node scripts/prerender-legal.cjs && node scripts/prerender-glossary.cjs && node scripts/prerender-help.cjs && node scripts/prerender-landing.cjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.cjs
scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-entry-uniqueness.cjs && node scripts/bot-preflight-scan.cjs --fail-at=4 && node scripts/bot-preflight-scan-glossary.cjs --fail-at=1 && node scripts/verify-program-walkthroughs.cjs && node scripts/claim-gate.cjs --all
